{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121405300BC31ACB790CE39F1A4"}"},"total":7891},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7450626728124990270","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一部令人难以抗拒的作品，它以其丰富的想象力和独特的叙事风格深深吸引了我的注意力。作者以其细腻的笔触描绘了一个人内心世界的点点滴滴，让人感受到了生活的美好与真谛。我强烈推荐这本书给那些热爱文学的朋友！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734750909,"group_id":"7429640968954989593","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3Nv3C91LcviB/asmY8OutZLyYAa4Ske0Isddf9Bpj/7","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/560967ac506a4db0b064338adbbffe31~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623869&x-signature=eo%2B38XQhY27HhVnfxSPOqQfaBCY%3D","user_id":"3364126029513379","user_name":"A傲娇o"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3364126029513379","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1723178180,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7429640968954989593","book_info":{"abstract":"前世，景云辉因伤人遭遇十年的牢狱之灾。
重生归来，他要换个活法。
前世的敌人太强大，他选择投身警校。
没有根基，没有背景，他的警途之路，只能拿命去拼。
赢！飞黄腾达，大小通吃。
输？他从未想过。
